about.headline: About me
about.text: I'm Volker, a frontend developer based in Cologne with extensive experience at the intersection of design and development. With a background in graphic design, I combine visual quality with technical execution to build modern, responsive interfaces that are intuitive and maintainable.
about.connect: I enjoy projects where strong UX, clean code architecture, and close cross-functional collaboration make the difference.

tech.headline: Tech
tech.text: I build frontends with a strong focus on performance, usability, and clear architecture. My stack includes HTML, CSS/SCSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, REST APIs, Git, and Supabase. In addition, I bring design expertise to translate corporate design requirements into functional, user-friendly interfaces.

dialog.headline: Don't see the skill you are looking for?
dialog.text: Feel free to reach out. I continuously expand my skill set and adapt quickly to new tools - across both engineering and design workflows. Right now, I am especially interested in:

intro.headline: Let's build something cool together!
intro.introtext: Whether you have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi – I'm always happy to hear from you. Let's see what we can build together.

work.headline: Projects
work.intro: A few things I've built recently – have a look!

project01.headline: El Pollo Loco
project01.description: El Polo Loco is a browser‑based jump‑and‑run game I built during my training at the Developer Akademie. The project showcases my skills in JavaScript, object‑oriented architecture, and implementing animations and game logic in the frontend. The goal was to create a lightweight, responsive game with clean and maintainable code.

project02.headline: Join
project02.description: Join is a collaborative task‑management application that I developed as part of a team during my training at the Developer Akademie. The project replicates core workflows of modern web applications, including a Kanban board, user management, and dynamic UI interactions. Our focus was on clean code architecture, agile teamwork, and building a scalable JavaScript‑based frontend.

project03.headline: DailyDash
project03.description: DailyDash is a personal dashboard project I’m building to organize my daily schedule, tasks, and athletic goals in one clean interface. It is designed to integrate multiple data sources such as calendar, weather, and fitness APIs into a modern, streamlined UI. The project is still in an early development phase, but initial screen designs and API concepts are already in place.

ref1.name: Dominik Koniorczyk
ref1.text: Working with Volker has shown me that he has an exceptional eye for detail. His CSS skills surpass anything I've seen before. His eagerness to learn is remarkable, and he always has an open ear for feedback. His friendly and open nature makes collaboration a real pleasure.

ref2.name: Martin Trzaskalik
ref2.text: Volker consistently demonstrated a strong customer-centric mindset and took real pride in his work. He delivered high-quality solutions that didn’t just look good, but drove measurable improvements in both conversion rates and customer satisfaction. His ability to manage complex requirements with clarity and efficiency made him a go-to expert, especially when it came to navigating the intricacies of our comprehensive platform.

ref3.name: Patrick Schauer
ref3.text: Volker is an eagle eye when it comes to design and UX. Due to his extensive experience, he knows how to build professionally styled, reusable UI components in the CSS world. I appreciate his relaxed manner and the many precise questions that improve the project.

general.headline: 1. General information
general.text: Protecting your personal data is important to me. Personal data is processed on this website only to the technically necessary extent and when you actively contact me.

controller.headline: 2. Data controller
controller.text: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:

hosting.headline: 3. Hosting and server log files
hosting.text: When this website is accessed, the hosting provider may automatically collect information in server log files (e.g. browser type, operating system, referrer URL, time of request, IP address). This data is used for technical stability and security and is not combined with other data sources.

contact.headline: 4. Contact form
contact.text: If you contact me via the contact form, your form data (name, email, message) will be processed to handle your request. Processing is based on your consent and for the purpose of responding to your inquiry.

storage.headline: 5. Storage period
storage.text: Personal data is stored only as long as necessary to process your request or as required by statutory retention obligations.

rights.headline: 6. Your rights
rights.text: You have the right to access your stored personal data at any time, as well as rights to rectification, deletion, restriction of processing, and objection to processing within the legal framework.

links.headline: 7. External links
links.text: This website contains links to external platforms such as LinkedIn or GitHub. When you click these links, the privacy policies of the respective providers apply.
